body.u: After leaving school I was very nervous about getting a job as my exam results were not very good and finding a job was hard. I was luckeylucky as my father owns a haulage firm so I had got a job with a fitter. I took my drivindriving test at 17 and passed 2nd time. Which was about the only thing I did pass. I stayed a fitter until I was 21 and, then I work for my father’s haulage firm after taking HGV Class I from then on I worked both in England and on the contintcontent.
The next big step was when I was 24 I got married and got a loan for a house at 27. We had got 2 boys which was good.

The next few years werntweren'ttotoo bad there was’twasn't much there that I can remberremember but, the wedding of children but after that I was wandering about retirement then it happened my perentsparents died and my brother and I had to sell the house and some of its contents. Well 10 years passed and retiementretirement came along and that is werewhere I am now.
